nodes.name: Banggai scops owl
nodes.summary: The Banggai scops owl (Otus mendeni) is an owl found on Banggai Island in Indonesia. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the Sulawesi scops owl (Otus manadensis), but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Banggai scops owl (Otus mendeni) is an owl found on Banggai Island in Indonesia. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the Sulawes…

nodes.name: Otus
nodes.summary: Otus（Otus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联54种鸟类，如White-fronted scops owl、Andaman scops owl、Reddish scops owl等54种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.summary: Banggai scops owl（Otus mendeni）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Banggai scops owl。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。
